title: Merger and consolidation
doc_html:
§1062.  Merger and consolidation

Professional chiropractic corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional chiropractic corporations.  

Added by Acts 1976, No. 686, §1.

§1062.  Merger and consolidation
Professional chiropractic corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional chiropractic corporations.
Added by Acts 1976, No. 686, §1.
